scheme_name: Nippon India Small Cap Fund Direct Growth

sections.overview: Key Information: | Category: Equity - Small Cap. | Riskometer: Very High Risk.
sections.exit_load: 1% if redeemed or switched out on or before 12 months (1 year / 365 days) from the date of allotment; Nil (0%) exit load if redeemed or switched out after 12 months (1 year / 365 days) from allotment.
sections.minimum_investment: Minimum SIP: Rs. 100 per month.. Minimum Lumpsum: Rs. 100.
sections.tax: Taxation rules for Equity schemes: Short Term Capital Gains (STCG) are taxed at 15% if units are redeemed within 1 year. Long Term Capital Gains (LTCG) are taxed at 10% (without indexation) on gains exceeding Rs. 1 lakh per financial year, provided units are held for more than 1 year.
sections.fund_management:
- Samir Rachh: Lead Fund Manager. Over 30 years of experience in equity research, key specialization in small-cap and mid-cap stock picking. Managing the fund since 2017.
- Tejas Sheth: Co-Fund Manager. Over 15 years of industry experience specializing in small-cap research and analytics.
- Kinjal Desai: Dedicated Fund Manager for Overseas Investments. Over 10 years of experience.
- Amber Singhania: Co-Fund Manager. Dedicated analyst with over 15 years of experience.
sections.investment_objective: The primary investment objective of the scheme is to generate long-term capital appreciation by investing predominantly in equity and equity-related instruments of small-cap companies.
sections.fund_house: Nippon India Mutual Fund (formerly Reliance Mutual Fund) is one of India's leading mutual fund houses. It is sponsored by Nippon Life Insurance Company of Japan, one of the largest life insurers in the world. The AMC is registered under SEBI and manages a diverse range of mutual fund schemes.
